account_id_to_raise_request_on_behalf_of: Account ID to raise request on behalf of
add_a_public_reply_to_a_customer_request: Add a public reply to a customer request and move it to the right status.
array_of_assets_object_schemas_id_name_o: Array of Assets object schemas (id, name, objectSchemaKey, status)
array_of_assets_object_types_id_name_obj: Array of Assets object types (id, name, objectSchemaId, objectCount)
array_of_assets_objects_from_an_aql_sear: Array of Assets objects from an AQL search (id, label, objectKey, attributes)
array_of_errors_from_copy_forms_operatio: Array of errors from copy forms operation
array_of_form_templates_id_name_updated_: Array of form templates (id, name, updated, portalRequestTypeIds, issueCreateIssueTypeIds)
array_of_forms_attached_to_an_issue_id: Array of forms attached to an issue (id, name, updated, submitted, lock, internal, formTemplateId)
array_of_object_type_attribute_definitio: Array of object type attribute definitions (id, name, type, minimumCardinality)
array_of_simplified_form_answers_each_wi: Array of simplified form answers, each with label, answer, fieldKey, and choice
comma_separated_account_ids_for_request_: Comma-separated account IDs for request participants
comma_separated_account_ids_to_add_as_pa: Comma-separated account IDs to add as participants
create_a_customer_request_on_the_right_s: Create a customer request on the right service desk with the correct request type.
describe_the_attribute_values_to_set: Describe the attribute values to set
describe_the_request_details_e_g_need_ac: Describe the request details (e.g., "need access to shared drive for new project")...
describe_the_service_request_e_g_need_vp: Describe the service request (e.g., "need VPN access", "laptop keyboard not working")...
describe_the_transition_reason_e_g_resol: Describe the transition reason (e.g., "resolved issue", "waiting for customer input")...
describe_what_you_want_to_communicate_e_: Describe what you want to communicate (e.g., "update on ticket progress", "request more information")...
enter_form_id_uuid_from_get_form_templat: Enter form ID (UUID from Get Form Templates or Attach Form)
enter_form_template_uuid_from_get_form_t: Enter form template UUID (from Get Form Templates)
enter_issue_id_or_key_e_g_sd: Enter issue ID or key (e.g., SD-123)
enter_jira_project_id_or_key_e_g: Enter Jira project ID or key (e.g., 10001 or SD)
filter_by_request_type_group_id: Filter by request type group ID
form_publishing_and_request_type_configu: Form publishing and request type configuration
form_state_with_status_open_submitted_lo: Form state with status (open, submitted, locked)
full_form_design_with_questions_labels_t: Full form design with questions (labels, types, choices, validation), layout, conditions, sections, settings
integrate_with_jira_service_management_f: Integrate with Jira Service Management for IT service management. Create and manage service requests, handle customers and organizations, track SLAs, and manage queues.
issue_to_copy_forms_from_e_g_sd: Issue to copy forms from (e.g., SD-123)
issue_to_copy_forms_to_e_g_sd: Issue to copy forms to (e.g., SD-456)
json_array_of_assets_object_attributes: JSON array of Assets object attributes

json_object_of_form_answers_for_form_bas: JSON object of form answers for form-based request types
json_object_of_request_field_values: JSON object of request field values
json_object_using_form_question_ids_as_k: JSON object using form question IDs as keys (e.g., {"1": {"text": "Title"}, "4": {"choices": ["5"]}, "14": {"text": "Details"}})
override_the_auto_resolved_assets_worksp: Override the auto-resolved Assets workspace ID
scan_open_requests_on_a_queue_and_flag: Scan open requests on a queue and flag ones at risk of breaching SLA.
scope_aql_search_to_a_schema_id: Scope AQL search to a schema ID
scope_the_search_to_a_schema_id: Scope the search to a schema ID
search_customers_by_name_or_email: Search customers by name or email

source_issue_id_or_key_for_copy: Source issue ID or key for copy
target_issue_id_or_key_for_copy: Target issue ID or key for copy
whether_comment_is_public_or_internal: Whether comment is public or internal
whether_participants_can_be_added_to_thi: Whether participants can be added to this request type
whether_requests_can_be_raised_on_behalf: Whether requests can be raised on behalf of another user
whether_the_form_has_been_submitted: Whether the form has been submitted
whether_the_form_is_internal_only: Whether the form is internal only
whether_the_form_was_successfully_delete: Whether the form was successfully deleted
whether_this_is_the_last_page: Whether this is the last page
